creator: david@landgren.net
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/p5-BSD-Sysctl,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/108043 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

A number of reports on cpan-testers gives it green light.

I approve of the patch.

Thanks,
David Landgren.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108043
>
